Snacks
Pork Belly Burnt Ends
Tender pieces of pork belly with caramelized Kathy's Sweet Sauce
Loaded Chips
Carolina Vinegar Chips loaded with choice of pulled pork or pulled chicken, Alabama White Sauce, Kathy's Sweet Sauce, queso, cheddar cheese, pico, scallions, and Serrano peppers
Smoked Chicken Wings (6 or 12)
Get’em dry rubbed or sauced! Sauces: Alabama White Sauce, Kathy’s Sweet Sauce Rod's Hot Sauce
Riblets
Pit cooked spare ribs cut into bite-sized pieces
Sliders
Mix & Match Pack
6 Mix & Match Sliders with choice of pulled pork, pulled chicken, brisket, or hot chicken
Sandwiches
Pulled Pork
Carolina style whole hog mopped with Rodney’s Vinegar Pepper Sauce, served on a toasted bun Served Traditional Style or Southern Style with Kathy's Sweet Sauce and pickles - choice of 1 side
Pulled Chicken
Served with Alabama White Sauce, on a toasted bun - choice of 1 side
Turkey Breast
Sliced smoked turkey breast, served on a toasted bun with a side of Alabama White Sauce - choice of 1 side
Brisket
Brisket, served on a toasted bun (sliced upon request) - choice of 1 side
Classic Griddle Burger
Two patties, white American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, and burger sauce

Rod’s Original Whole Hog Plate
8oz perfectly seasoned pit cooked whole hog - choice of 2 sides

Southern Chopped Salad
Chopped iceberg, bacon, cheddar cheese, hard boiled egg, cucumbers, grape tomatoes, red onions, and cornbread croutons, topped with your choice of pit cooked meat (whole hog, pulled chicken, turkey, brisket ($4)
Rodney's Hot Chicken
Rodney's Hot Chicken Tender Sandwich
Fried chicken tenders doused in Rodney's Hot Sauce, topped with cole slaw and served on a bun
4 Piece Plate + 2 Sides
